title: Melted Indian Chocolate Curry
description: A rich and creamy curry infused with the deep flavors of melted chocolate.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, heat the ghee over low heat.
Add the garam masala, cinnamon powder, and nutmeg powder. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the dark chocolate chips and stir until melted.
Pour in the heavy cream and stir until well combined.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes or until thickened.
Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
Serve chilled and garnish with a sprinkle of cinnamon powder, if desired.
